prompt: A breathtaking, surreal travel poster on a white canvas background, featuring a magical, glowing red silk ribbon that flows diagonally from the bottom right to the top left, seamlessly blending traditional and modern elements of a city. At the bottom right, a tiny figure of a woman in a flowing red Hanfu holds the end of the ribbon. As the ribbon winds upward, it transforms into a dynamic cityscape. The lower-middle section features {argument name="traditional landmark" default="multi-story wooden stilt houses glowing with warm lanterns"} with a modern monorail train passing through them. The center showcases a vibrant, illuminated modern metropolis with {argument name="modern landmark" default="a cluster of futuristic skyscrapers connected by a skybridge"}, a wide river with boats, a red suspension bridge, and a cable car suspended in the air. The top fades into majestic, misty mountains, traditional pavilions, and a pale red sun. The left side of the poster features elegant typography: large, golden, textured Chinese calligraphy reading "{argument name="city name chinese" default="重庆"}", with the English text "{argument name="city name english" default="CHONGQING"}" below it. Further down, the text "{argument name="season and year" default="SPRING 2026"}" is displayed in a clean, serif font, accompanied by smaller vertical Chinese text and red traditional seal stamps. The overall style is a masterful blend of traditional Chinese ink wash painting and hyper-realistic, cinematic 3D rendering with soft, ethereal clouds and mist framing the composition.
translatedPrompt: A breathtaking, surreal travel poster on a white canvas background, featuring a magical, glowing red silk ribbon that flows diagonally from the bottom right to the top left, seamlessly blending traditional and modern elements of a city. At the bottom right, a tiny figure of a woman in a flowing red Hanfu holds the end of the ribbon. As the ribbon winds upward, it transforms into a dynamic cityscape. The lower-middle section features {argument name="traditional landmark" default="multi-story wooden stilt houses glowing with warm lanterns"} with a modern monorail train passing through them. The center showcases a vibrant, illuminated modern metropolis with {argument name="modern landmark" default="a cluster of futuristic skyscrapers connected by a skybridge"}, a wide river with boats, a red suspension bridge, and a cable car suspended in the air. The top fades into majestic, misty mountains, traditional pavilions, and a pale red sun. The left side of the poster features elegant typography: large, golden, textured Chinese calligraphy reading "{argument name="city name chinese" default="重庆"}", with the English text "{argument name="city name english" default="CHONGQING"}" below it. Further down, the text "{argument name="season and year" default="SPRING 2026"}" is displayed in a clean, serif font, accompanied by smaller vertical Chinese text and red traditional seal stamps. The overall style is a masterful blend of traditional Chinese ink wash painting and hyper-realistic, cinematic 3D rendering with soft, ethereal clouds and mist framing the composition.

breakdown.creativeCore: Surreal Cityscape Travel Poster：Generates a stunning, surreal travel poster blending traditional ink-wash aesthetics with hyper-realistic modern cityscapes, perfect for tourism campaigns or event promotions.
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, 3d, ink wash]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
